titleStmt.title: SII 19.326: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 326. (A.R. No. 434 of 1918.) TIRUKKARUGĀVŪR, SIRGALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VĒḶVIḌAINĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the appointment of nine persons for playing music during the three services of the sandhis, of ardhayāma and paḷḷi-eḻuchchi in the temple of Tiruveḷḷaḍai-Mahādēva at Tirukkurugāvūr in Tiruvāli-nāḍu, and the endowment of 1 vēli, 3 mā and 3 kāṇi of land for their maintenance, made by Śembaṉ Aruḷaṉ Uttamanidhi alias Uttamaśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ. An additional piece of a mā and kāṇi of land was also given to them towards their service during the paḷḷi-eḻuchchi. The donor is also stated to have built the temple with stone. This is assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 3 patiṉmūṉṟāvatu tiruvālināṭṭu tirukkurukāvūrt tiruveḷ
ḷaṭaimahādevarkku cempan Aruḷan nuttamaniti
yāṉa Uttamacoḻamuventaveḷār tirukkaṟṟaḷiiṭṭu
Ittevarkku vaitta śrīpali koṭṭakkaṭava Ivvūr śrītaraṉāṉa
pāṅkāṇaiyākiya Añūṟṟuvaveḷāṉ Āḷ muṉṟum Ivaṉ ma
kaḷ veṭṭu stritaṉam peṟṟuṭaiya tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu kaḻanivāyil mātar
civaṉ māṇikkaṉ kāṭanākiya Uttamanitip perukaccaṉāḷ nālum
Ivaiññūṟṟuvaveḷāṉ makaḷaiye veṭṭu strītaṉam peṟṟuṭaiya U
ṇi ketta nāḷ ḷiraṇṭumāka Āḷoṉpatu Ivvo
ṉpatāḷuṅ koṇṭu trikāla muṉṟu cantiyum Ardayāmamum
paḷḷiyeḻucciyuṅ koṭṭakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷukku ceytukuṭutta
nilamāvatu nam Ivūr melaiiṭaip puṉcey tevatāṉatte perumāḷvati
kku vaṭakku veliye muṉṟumā mukkāṇi Ivveliye muṉṟumā mukkā
ṇi nilamum koṇṭu candrātittavaṟ koṭṭakaṭavārkaḷāka ceytukuṭutteṉ ce
mpaṉa Aruḷaṉ ṉuttamanitiyākiya Uttamacoḻamuventaveḷāneṉ civa
kāmi dharmmapriyaṉ neḻuttu Ivarkaḷukke Iṭṭa puncey
yile paḷḷiyeḻuccikku Iṭṭa
nilam varippaṭi maṭakku Oru mākā
ṇi .
Digital edition of SII 19.326 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
